# Iridescence Healing

> Reiki, sound healing, cacao, breathwork and intuitive energy guidance with Mehtap in uptown New Orleans. Book in-person and virtual sessions.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of Iridescence Healing's offerings in New Orleans.
- [About](/about): Meet Mehtap — Reiki Master, sound healer and intuitive guide.
- [Offerings](/offerings): All healing modalities, pricing and how to book.
- [Crystal Reiki & Sound](/crystal-reiki): Intuitive Reiki with crystals and 432Hz sound.
- [The Resonance Reset](/resonance-release): Signature 1:1 breath, sound, Reiki and somatic release.
- [Self-Love Mentoring](/self-love-mentoring): Six-week devotional 1:1 mentorship.
- [Cacao Ceremonies](/cacao-ceremonies): Heart-opening ceremonial cacao circles.
- [Breath & Yoga](/breath-yoga): Pranayama, somatic breathwork and Kundalini yoga.
- [Meditation](/meditation): Guided meditation sessions.
- [Packages](/packages): Multi-session healing packages.
- [Retreats](/retreats): Global and local healing retreats.
- [Events](/events): Upcoming sound baths, ceremonies and workshops.
- [Reviews](/reviews): Client testimonials.
- [Quiz](/quiz): 60-second quiz to find your healing path.
- [Book](/book): Book a session.
- [Contact](/contact): Get in touch with Mehtap.
